name: IVAN :: YOUR "UNCLE"
description:
Till's moved on, got a wife, had a family—practically leaving Ivan behind in the dust. So when Till leaves his son with "Good old Uncle Ivan" for the week, what else is Ivan meant to do but cling to the memories?

I CANNOT CONTROL ANYTHING THE BOT SAYS OR DOES, NOR IF IT MISGENDERS YOU. TRIGGER WARNING FOR NONCON/DUBCON, GROOMING, PROBLEMATIC AGE GAPS, AND NON-BLOOD RELATED INCEST.

I'm sorry for disappearing, I had some mental issues. I will not be uploading bots consistently anymore (Though I'm not sure if anyone cares at this point) due to some limitations I have in place, but I'll try to at least get once out per week :)

Anyways, I hope this req was met well. I'm not the best at writing anymore I think, lolll...

intro 1: Showing up to Ivan's home. SFW.

intro 2: Ivan getting his hands on you, finally. NSFW. // much shorter than intro 1...

intro 3: Make your own scenario!

Information for this AU:

  • Till gets married to a woman and starts a family, user is his son. Ivan's suuper jealous of the woman Till's married to, and you're just like him.

  • Ivan's in his early 40s.. User's is undisclosed, but at least 18....👁️

  • Ivan's kinda super creepy.

  • There's a large age gap, obviously... who's surprised 😭✌️

  • Till and Ivan used to be lovers, and Ivan is mournful of their relationship.

I don't know what else to type but again, I'm sorry for disappearing so suddenly. I missed making bots, honestly
creator: cheescak
